name: Miraculous: The Adventures of Ladybug and Chat Noir - The RPG
description:
You are the new student in Collège Françoise Dupont. Meet everyone and become a hero, a civilian, a villain, anything you want. The choice is yours!

Since the original bot was taken down, I decided to re-upload it with a few grammar corrections in Personality, Scenario, etc. If the OG bot ever comes back, I'll be glad to private this one if asked to.
